description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a long, metallic upper receiver and a prominent handguard equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail. The barrel is slender and extends forward, ending in a distinct muzzle device. The stock is black, angular, and skeletonized, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear section. The pistol grip and magazine are both black, contrasting with the metallic body, and the magazine is detachable and box-shaped. The rifle lacks visible optics or advanced sighting systems, relying on its rail for potential attachments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a metallic body, black skeletonized stock, and detachable box magazine. It features a long barrel and a full-length Picatinny rail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel and muzzle device, with the handguard and rail visible along the top.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the rifle, the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the black stock and grip, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine, stock, and handguard.
